{{define "page-main"}}
{{if .Page.Ancestors}}
{{range .Page.Ancestors}}{{if ne .Kind "home"}}{{with .LinkTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.Title}}{{end}}/{{end}}{{end}} {{.Page.Title}}
{{end}}

{{.Page.Title}}

{{with .Page.Description}}

{{.}}

{{end}}
{{if .Page.ContentHTML}}
{{rawHTML .Page.ContentHTML}}
{{end}} {{if .Pages}}
{{range .Pages.ByWeight}} {{if and (not .Draft) (eq .Kind "page")}} {{with .LinkTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.Title}}{{end}} {{with .Description}}{{.}}{{end}} {{end}} {{end}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
